blended.narrative: Hogadon is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,581 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 47°F, winds around 23 mph.
Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 19".
